milestones.title: Baseline contour and validation
milestones.goal: Lock and verify the already implemented baseline elements of Engine/Client separation.

features.title: Close remaining Engine/Client separation points and formally fix module boundaries.
features.description: This feature introduces close remaining Engine/Client separation points and formally fix module boundaries and defines the expected behavior, boundaries, and outcome for implementation.

issues.title: Boundary contract freeze
issues.description: Ownership boundaries between Engine and Client are ambiguous and lead to inconsistent implementation decisions. Freeze a single explicit boundary contract so responsibilities are clear and enforceable.

tasks.title: Freeze Engine/Client ownership contract in canonical docs
tasks.summary: Audit and normalize Engine/Client ownership wording and endpoint responsibilities in canonical documentation to remove ambiguity.

issues.title: Boundary enforcement and regression guards
issues.description: Boundary violations can silently reappear after refactors. Add enforceable checks and regression guards so forbidden coupling is detected early and consistently.

tasks.title: Harden boundary checks for forbidden coupling and direct frontend Engine reads
tasks.summary: Adjust boundary guard scripts to catch forbidden imports/DB coupling and ensure they stay integrated into split smoke checks.

issues.title: Baseline contour validation
issues.description: The current split contour lacks a reproducible validation baseline. Define and run explicit contour validation with clear pass/fail semantics.

tasks.title: Validate local/dev split contour and document failure semantics
tasks.summary: Run split startup/health/bridge/boundary checks and document pass/fail expectations for reproducible Milestone 1 baseline validation.

features.title: Formalize the Client <-> Engine API contract in a separate specification and make it the source of truth.
features.description: This feature introduces formalize the Client <-> Engine API contract in a separate specification and make it the source of truth and defines the expected behavior, boundaries, and outcome for implementation.

features.title: Lock and document the baseline Client <-> Engine integration contract (validation, error handling, proxy behavior).
features.description: This feature introduces lock and document the baseline Client <-> Engine integration contract (validation, error handling, proxy behavior) and defines the expected behavior, boundaries, and outcome for implementation.

features.title: Automate repeatable workflow and pipeline operations with scripts.
features.description: This feature introduces automate repeatable workflow and pipeline operations with scripts and defines the expected behavior, boundaries, and outcome for implementation.

issues.title: CLI and base workflow commands
issues.description: The workflow needs a stable CLI foundation for core feature operations. Implement base command surfaces with deterministic behavior and output contracts.

tasks.title: Add `dev/workflow` CLI entrypoint and command router
tasks.summary: Create the workflow CLI entrypoint with routing for feature/task/confirm/validate command groups used by the process flow.

tasks.title: Implement feature base commands for create/plan/approve/execution-plan
tasks.summary: Implement base feature commands (`create`, `plan-init`, `plan-lint`, `approve`, `execution-plan`) with approved-state gates and deterministic output contracts.

issues.title: Tracking sync and validations
issues.description: Tracking state can drift between local artifacts and break execution flow. Synchronize DEV_MAP, TASK_LIST, and pipeline updates as one consistent operation.

tasks.title: Implement `plan tasks for feature --write` for DEV_MAP/TASK_LIST/PIPELINE
tasks.summary: Implement sync command that applies approved manual decomposition delta to the three local trackers in one change set.

tasks.title: Add task_count-based allocation, ownership checks, and tracking/repo validation
tasks.summary: Enforce task ID allocation only via `task_count`, verify ownership markers and parent chains, and provide `validate --scope tracking|repo` checks.

issues.title: Materialize/Confirm integration and protocol contract
issues.description: Materialize and confirm flows can diverge between local and remote state. Align both flows to one protocol contract with deterministic update behavior.

tasks.title: Implement `feature materialize` with canonical branch policy and milestone assignment
tasks.summary: Implement feature materialization from local issue nodes to GitHub with milestone resolution and canonical branch linkage persistence.

tasks.title: Implement `confirm task|issue|feature|standalone-issue` cascade with GitHub close
tasks.summary: Implement confirmation commands that cascade local status updates, cleanup pending-only pipeline entries, and close mapped GitHub issues in the same run.

tasks.title: Refactor process docs to split responsibilities and remove duplicated rules
tasks.summary: Eliminate concrete process conflicts and duplication across AGENTS.md, TASK_EXECUTION_PROTOCOL.md, FEATURE_PLANNING_PROTOCOL.md, and FEATURE_WORKFLOW.md by fixing one canonical command order (sync before materialize), assigning one owner per concern, and replacing repeated normative blocks with explicit cross-references.

issues.title: Workflow CLI hardening and missing contracts completion
issues.description: Several CLI paths still have weak validation and incomplete edge-case handling. Harden command contracts so failures are explicit, predictable, and actionable.

tasks.title: Make `dev/workflow` executable and align smoke entrypoint
tasks.summary: Set executable mode for `dev/workflow` and update smoke checks to run canonical `./dev/workflow` command.

tasks.title: Implement `task preflight|validate` command contracts
tasks.summary: Replace placeholder handlers with deterministic preflight/validate checks and stable JSON output contracts.

tasks.title: Complete `feature create --github` feature-issue wiring
tasks.summary: Implement feature-level GitHub issue create/update with milestone mapping and persist `gh_issue_number/gh_issue_url` in DEV_MAP during `--write`.

tasks.title: Split workflow command internals by responsibility
tasks.summary: Extract delta parsing, tracker writes, and git/github adapters from monolithic command modules while preserving CLI behavior.

tasks.title: Add regression smoke scenarios for full workflow chain
tasks.summary: Cover success and gate-fail paths for create/plan/approve/sync/materialize/execution-plan/confirm flows.

issues.title: JSON-only tracker storage for task list and execution pipeline
issues.description: Mixed tracker formats increase parsing complexity and state drift risk. Move runtime tracking to JSON-only contracts for consistent behavior.

tasks.title: Define canonical JSON contracts for task list and pipeline
tasks.summary: Introduce strict JSON structures for TASK_LIST and TASK_EXECUTION_PIPELINE and lock Markdown out of runtime source role.

tasks.title: Switch workflow readers/writers from Markdown trackers to JSON
tasks.summary: Migrate feature/task/confirm/validate command data paths to JSON tracker files while preserving command semantics.

tasks.title: Migrate existing tracker data to JSON with deterministic conversion
tasks.summary: Add and run one-time conversion for current TASK_LIST and pipeline data into canonical JSON files.

tasks.title: Align smoke checks and protocols with JSON-only tracker mode
tasks.summary: Update workflow smoke and protocol docs so tracker operations use JSON-only sources consistently.

issues.title: Scoped materialization for one child issue (`--issue-id`)
issues.description: Materialize currently applies too broadly when only one issue needs synchronization. Add explicit single-issue targeting with ownership validation via --issue-id.

tasks.title: Add --issue-id selector for materialize issue modes
tasks.summary: Extend feature materialize arguments to accept a specific child issue ID in issues-create and issues-sync modes.

tasks.title: Enforce issue ownership and scoped execution
tasks.summary: Validate that issue-id belongs to target feature and materialize only that issue node.

issues.title: Issue creation command for feature/standalone with optional plan init
issues.description: There is no unified command to register new feature and standalone issues. Add a creation flow that initializes required local tracking context.

issues.title: Create-only child issue materialization without edits for mapped issues
issues.description: Create mode can unintentionally edit already mapped GitHub issues. Restrict issues-create to create-only behavior and skip mapped issues.

tasks.title: Implement create-only materialize behavior for child issues
tasks.summary: In issues-create mode create only unmapped child issues and skip mapped issues without gh issue edit calls.

tasks.title: Add smoke coverage for create-only no-edit path
tasks.summary: Add regression checks that mapped child issues are not edited in issues-create mode.

issues.title: Add workflow CLI show/status commands for feature/issue/task
issues.description: Operators lack quick CLI visibility into feature and issue state. Add show/status commands for faster inspection and debugging.

issues.title: Sync feature-issue checklist on child issue materialize and confirm
issues.description: Feature-level checklist state becomes stale after child issue changes. Keep checklist markers synchronized during materialize and confirm flows.

tasks.title: Append missing child-issue checkboxes in feature issue during materialize
tasks.summary: When child issues are materialized ensure feature-level issue body contains checklist lines for missing child issues.

tasks.title: Update feature-issue checklist state on confirm issue done
tasks.summary: When confirming issue done update corresponding checkbox to checked state in feature-level GitHub issue.

issues.title: Require explicit materialize mode (`bootstrap|issues-create|issues-sync`)
issues.description: Materialize behavior is ambiguous without an explicit mode selector. Require bootstrap/create/sync mode and enforce mode-specific semantics.

tasks.title: Require --mode for feature materialize and validate enum
tasks.summary: Update CLI parser so feature materialize fails without mode and accepts only bootstrap, issues-create, issues-sync.

tasks.title: Split materialize flow into explicit mode handlers
tasks.summary: Implement separate code paths for bootstrap, issues-create, and issues-sync with deterministic output action labels.

tasks.title: Align protocol and workflow docs with required mode contract
tasks.summary: Update protocol/workflow docs and smoke expectations to reflect required mode and mode-specific behavior.

issues.title: Add issue-level Approved gate before execution/materialization
issues.description: Execution can start before issue readiness is explicitly approved. Enforce an issue-level Approved gate before execution and materialization.

tasks.title: Add issue-level Approved transition in confirm contract
tasks.summary: Support explicit confirm issue approved and persist issue status lifecycle Planned -> Approved -> Done.

tasks.title: Gate execute/materialize issue paths by issue Approved status
tasks.summary: Block execute issue and materialize issues modes when issue status is not Approved and add clear gate error messages.

issues.title: Auto-delete sync delta file after successful decomposition write
issues.description: Processed sync delta files can accumulate and be reused accidentally. Remove delta artifacts automatically after successful decomposition writes.

issues.title: Replace checkbox-based GitHub issue body with description-driven readable content
issues.description: Checkbox-heavy issue bodies are noisy and difficult to read. Replace them with concise narrative descriptions that explain intent and problem clearly.

tasks.title: Add issue description field contract to DEV_MAP and sync path
tasks.summary: Extend issue-node contract and decomposition sync handling so issue description can be persisted and used as canonical human-readable issue context.

tasks.title: Implement deterministic description generation and backfill
tasks.summary: Generate default issue descriptions from title and mapped tasks, and backfill missing descriptions for existing local issue nodes.

tasks.title: Rewrite child issue body renderer to description-driven format
tasks.summary: Replace checkbox transport in child issue body rendering with concise readable sections sourced from issue descriptions.

tasks.title: Rewrite feature issue body and remove checklist coupling
tasks.summary: Render feature-level issue body as readable summary with child issue references and decouple confirm/materialize flows from checklist patching.

tasks.title: Add smoke/docs coverage for description-based body sync
tasks.summary: Update smoke checks and workflow docs to enforce no-checkbox body policy and cover mapped GitHub body resync behavior.

issues.title: Feature materialize: reconcile GitHub sub-issues from DEV_MAP issue set
issues.description: Parent feature sub-issues can drift from mapped local issue state. Reconcile GitHub sub-issues from DEV_MAP mappings to keep hierarchy consistent.

tasks.title: Add GitHub adapter helpers for feature sub-issues operations
tasks.summary: Implement deterministic list/add sub-issue API helpers with explicit error handling for unsupported responses and permission failures.

tasks.title: Reconcile parent feature sub-issues during materialize
tasks.summary: Update materialize issues-create and issues-sync flows to reconcile parent sub-issues from current mapped DEV_MAP issues and return deterministic sync payload fields.

tasks.title: Cover reconcile idempotency and partial mapping behavior
tasks.summary: Add smoke scenarios and docs updates for first-run add, second-run no-op, and explicit reporting of skipped unmapped issues.

issues.title: Issue planning status split: Pending (no plan) vs Planned (has plan)
issues.description: Pending and Planned states are currently blurred and hard to trust. Split them by issue-plan presence so status reflects real planning progress.

tasks.title: Define Pending vs Planned issue-planning status contract
tasks.summary: Extend issue status contract so Pending means no issue plan block and Planned means issue plan block exists.

tasks.title: Implement issue-plan presence detection and status reconciliation
tasks.summary: Add parser/reconciliation logic that maps issue-plan block presence in FEATURE_PLANS to Pending/Planned status for active issues.

tasks.title: Add lint and smoke coverage for Pending/Planned split
tasks.summary: Add regression checks for Pending defaults, Pending->Planned transition, and deterministic mismatch errors.

issues.title: Reject issue flow: add Rejected status and close mapped GitHub issue with explicit rejection marker
issues.description: Rejected issues need a clear and auditable lifecycle path. Add explicit reject flow that updates local status and closes mapped GitHub issue with reason.

tasks.title: Add reject issue command and local Rejected transition
tasks.summary: Extend confirm/issue flow with explicit reject issue command that validates ownership and updates local issue status to Rejected.

tasks.title: Close mapped GitHub issue with rejection marker
tasks.summary: Implement reject handling that closes mapped GitHub issue with explicit rejection marker while remaining successful when mapping is missing.

tasks.title: Add reject-flow regression coverage and protocol updates
tasks.summary: Add smoke tests for success, missing mapping, and repeated reject idempotency; align protocol/workflow docs with rejected-state semantics.

issues.title: Standardize per-issue plan block format in FEATURE_PLANS and enforce strict heading lint
issues.description: Issue plan blocks in FEATURE_PLANS are inconsistent and fragile to parse. Standardize block structure and enforce strict heading lint.

tasks.title: Define canonical per-issue plan block format
tasks.summary: Specify one canonical issue-plan heading/section structure for FEATURE_PLANS and document required sections.

tasks.title: Enforce strict lint for issue-plan block hierarchy
tasks.summary: Extend feature plan lint to validate issue block headings, uniqueness, and required section content.

tasks.title: Normalize existing issue-plan blocks and add regression checks
tasks.summary: Migrate existing issue-plan entries to canonical format and add smoke checks for parser/lint stability.

issues.title: Feature plan issue execution order block as the source of issue sequencing
issues.description: Issue sequencing is not anchored to one canonical source. Make Issue Execution Order block authoritative for execution order decisions.

tasks.title: Define issue execution order block contract in feature plans
tasks.summary: Specify a canonical Issue Execution Order block format inside FEATURE_PLANS and enforce inclusion rules for active issues.

tasks.title: Enforce order-block consistency in feature plan lint
tasks.summary: Extend feature plan lint to validate issue order block structure, uniqueness, and consistency against DEV_MAP active issue set.

tasks.title: Expose next issue from plan order in execution guidance
tasks.summary: Update feature execution-plan output to surface the next eligible issue from Issue Execution Order and add smoke/docs coverage.

issues.title: Rename decomposition commands from sync to plan tasks for issue/feature
issues.description: Legacy sync naming no longer matches current decomposition semantics. Rename commands to canonical issue/feature planning names for clear intent.

tasks.title: Implement canonical plan-tasks command names in CLI
tasks.summary: Add first-class command handlers for plan tasks for issue/feature and remove decomposition naming drift in CLI entrypoints.

tasks.title: Update protocol/workflow docs to plan-tasks terminology
tasks.summary: Replace decomposition-step command wording from sync to plan tasks for issue/feature in canonical docs.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for hard command rename
tasks.summary: Add smoke tests for new plan-tasks commands and explicit rejection of removed legacy sync command path.

issues.title: Confirm issue done: script-driven cleanup of issue plan block and linked issue/task tracker nodes
issues.description: Confirming issue completion can leave stale plan and tracker artifacts. Add scripted cleanup so done issues are removed consistently from related structures.

tasks.title: Define confirm-issue cleanup contract for plans and trackers
tasks.summary: Define write-mode cleanup semantics for confirm issue so linked plan/tracker artifacts are removed in one scripted flow.

tasks.title: Implement FEATURE_PLANS and DEV_MAP issue-node cleanup in confirm flow
tasks.summary: Remove issue plan block/order row and remove confirmed issue node with child tasks during confirm issue write path.

tasks.title: Add smoke and idempotency checks for confirm cleanup behavior
tasks.summary: Cover cleanup behavior across FEATURE_PLANS/DEV_MAP/TASK_LIST/PIPELINE and repeated confirm no-op stability.

issues.title: Feature materialize: support multi-issue queue in one command run
issues.description: Materializing multiple issues currently requires repetitive one-by-one commands. Support ordered multi-issue queue execution in a single run.

tasks.title: Extend materialize CLI with ordered multi-issue queue input
tasks.summary: Replace single issue selector with repeatable queue parsing that preserves order and keeps bootstrap mode incompatible with issue selectors.

tasks.title: Implement queue validation and queue-ordered materialize flow
tasks.summary: Resolve and validate queued issue IDs, reject duplicates and missing ownership, then process create or sync actions in stable queue order.

tasks.title: Add queue-mode regression checks and command docs
tasks.summary: Add smoke scenarios for multi-issue queue success and failure paths, and update protocol/workflow examples for queue usage.

issues.title: Issue lifecycle status contract: Pending -> Planned -> Tasked with planning/materialize gates
issues.description: Issue lifecycle transitions are not enforced consistently across planning steps. Enforce Pending -> Planned -> Tasked progression with clear gates.

tasks.title: Implement issue status transition contract Pending-Planned-Tasked
tasks.summary: Define and wire deterministic issue lifecycle transitions so task decomposition advances issue status to Tasked after planning prerequisites.

tasks.title: Enforce decomposition gate for Pending issues
tasks.summary: Reject plan-tasks commands for issue nodes that remain Pending and return deterministic guidance to run plan issue first.

tasks.title: Gate materialize by Tasked issue status
tasks.summary: Require Tasked status on selected issue nodes before issues-create or issues-sync materialization proceeds.

tasks.title: Add lifecycle gate regression coverage and doc alignment
tasks.summary: Extend smoke checks and canonical docs for Pending-Planned-Tasked transitions, decomposition gating, and materialize gate behavior.

issues.title: Remove approve feature plan command and approval gate from workflow lifecycle
issues.description: Feature approval command introduces redundant gating and workflow friction. Remove approve feature plan path and simplify lifecycle flow.

tasks.title: Remove feature approve command from CLI surface
tasks.summary: Delete feature approve parser registration and handler wiring so the command is no longer available in workflow CLI usage/help output.

tasks.title: Remove Approved status gates from feature command paths
tasks.summary: Remove runtime checks that require feature status Approved before plan-tasks, materialize, execution-plan, and validation command paths.

tasks.title: Audit and remove residual Approved-only dependencies
tasks.summary: Run a repository workflow audit to remove remaining mandatory Approved-state dependencies and keep status for reporting only.

tasks.title: Align docs and smoke tests with no-approve lifecycle
tasks.summary: Update canonical protocol/workflow docs and smoke coverage to reflect approve-command removal and no Approved-gate workflow behavior.

issues.title: Automate plan issue command with canonical issue-plan block upsert and scoped lint
issues.description: Manual issue-plan block editing is error-prone and inconsistent. Automate canonical block upsert with scoped lint and deterministic output.

tasks.title: Add feature plan-issue CLI command and output contract
tasks.summary: Register feature plan-issue subcommand with required inputs and deterministic JSON output fields for write and dry-run paths.

tasks.title: Implement issue resolver and ownership assertion contract
tasks.summary: Resolve issue owner feature from DEV_MAP and return deterministic errors for malformed, missing, duplicate, and mismatched ownership cases.

tasks.title: Implement canonical issue-plan block upsert in feature plans
tasks.summary: Create or update one target issue plan block with canonical dependencies, decomposition, and assessment sections without mutating other issue blocks.

tasks.title: Add scoped issue-plan lint and issue-order guard
tasks.summary: Validate only the target issue plan block and enforce read-only issue execution order presence checks for active issues.

tasks.title: Add plan-issue smoke coverage and protocol updates
tasks.summary: Cover success, failure, and idempotency paths for plan-issue and align workflow planning docs with command boundaries.

issues.title: Add plan tasks for issues command for batch issue decomposition in one run
issues.description: Batch issue decomposition currently needs multiple separate command runs. Add one-pass multi-issue planning command with ordered queue support.

tasks.title: Add CLI command surface for plan tasks for issues
tasks.summary: Register plan tasks for issues command with repeatable --issue-id and deterministic output contract for multi-issue scope.

tasks.title: Implement multi-issue queue filter and one-pass decomposition application
tasks.summary: Validate issue queue ownership/duplicates and apply one-pass task allocation and delta filtering for selected issue IDs.

tasks.title: Add smoke coverage and docs for multi-issue plan tasks command
tasks.summary: Extend workflow smoke and protocol/workflow docs with success and failure contracts for plan tasks for issues.

issues.title: Add dedicated sync feature command for feature-only remote sync
issues.description: Feature synchronization currently goes through issues-sync flow, which mixes issue updates with feature updates and blurs command intent. Add a dedicated sync feature command that updates only feature-level remote metadata/body for one feature id, one milestone id, or all features.

tasks.title: Add `sync feature` CLI surface with selectors
tasks.summary: Register dedicated `sync feature` command with `--feature-id`, `--milestone-id`, and `--all` selectors and keep argument contract isolated from `sync issues`.

tasks.title: Implement feature-target resolution and selector validation
tasks.summary: Enforce exactly one selector mode per run, resolve deterministic feature target set, and return explicit validation errors for invalid selector combinations.

tasks.title: Implement feature-only GitHub sync executor
tasks.summary: Update mapped feature issue title/body from `feature.title` and `feature.description` without touching child issue nodes or running issue materialization logic.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage and docs for `sync feature`
tasks.summary: Cover selector modes (`--feature-id`, `--milestone-id`, `--all`), validation failures, and deterministic summary output in smoke/docs updates.

issues.title: Add confirm issues batch command for multi-issue completion
issues.description: Confirming multiple issues currently requires repetitive one-by-one command runs and increases operator error risk. Add confirm issues batch mode so multiple issue ids can be confirmed done in one command, especially when confirming more than two issues.

tasks.title: Add `confirm issues` CLI command surface
tasks.summary: Register plural confirm command with repeatable `--issue-id` queue input and keep existing single `confirm issue` command behavior intact.

tasks.title: Enforce batch gate and issue-queue validation
tasks.summary: Require plural command path when confirming more than two issues and validate queue integrity (format, duplicates, ownership constraints).

tasks.title: Implement batch confirm executor with aggregate result contract
tasks.summary: Execute existing single-issue completion semantics per queued issue and return deterministic per-item plus aggregate summary fields for partial failures.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage and docs for `confirm issues` batch mode
tasks.summary: Add smoke/docs coverage for successful batch confirm, duplicate ids rejection, and partial-failure reporting semantics.

issues.title: DevMap Viewer: show feature/issue descriptions in expanded rows and hide task timestamps
issues.description: In DevMap Viewer expanded rows, issue context is incomplete because only GitHub issue number is visible, and task timestamps add visual noise. Show human-readable description text for expanded Feature and Issue rows, and remove task timestamp rendering from the task list view.

tasks.title: Add DevMap Viewer expanded-row description data mapping
tasks.summary: Prepare viewer row builders so expanded Feature and Issue rows can read and render description text from DEV_MAP nodes.

tasks.title: Render issue description in expanded Issue rows
tasks.summary: Update expanded Issue row UI to show issue description near existing GitHub metadata instead of showing only issue number context.

tasks.title: Render feature description in expanded Feature rows and remove task timestamp
tasks.summary: Show feature description in expanded Feature rows and remove task timestamp rendering from task rows while keeping task title and status visible.

tasks.title: Add viewer regression checks for description visibility and timestamp removal
tasks.summary: Add/update viewer smoke/manual checks that verify description visibility on expand and absence of task timestamp text.

issues.title: Reject issue flow: cleanup issue plan/tasks and delete unmapped issue nodes
issues.description: Current reject issue behavior updates status but does not fully clean issue artifacts. Extend reject flow so mapped issues close on GitHub and clean local plan/task artifacts, while unmapped issues are removed from local DEV_MAP issue list instead of only changing status.

tasks.title: Reject issue: branch by materialization state and delete unmapped issue nodes
tasks.summary: Extend reject issue flow so unmapped issues (no gh_issue mapping) are removed from local DEV_MAP issue list instead of only setting status.

tasks.title: Reject issue: cleanup issue plan and task artifacts when present
tasks.summary: When rejecting an issue with plan/tasks, remove issue plan block/order row and cleanup tracker task artifacts similarly to confirm issue cleanup behavior.

tasks.title: Reject issue: keep mapped close/status flow and no-op when artifacts missing
tasks.summary: For mapped issues, keep close-remote-and-set-status flow; when plan/tasks are absent, continue without failures and return deterministic cleanup payload.

tasks.title: Add reject-flow regression coverage for mapped/unmapped cleanup scenarios
tasks.summary: Add smoke/docs coverage for unmapped delete, mapped close with cleanup, and no-plan/no-task pass-through behavior.

issues.title: Allow materialize for Pending issues without mandatory issue plan/tasks
issues.description: Materialization of new issue nodes is currently blocked until issue plan and task decomposition are created. Allow materialize for Pending issues so GitHub issue mapping can be created earlier.

issues.title: Split DEV_MAP schema ownership into JSON schema and rules doc only
issues.description: Replace the Markdown schema owner with two canonical files only: `DEV_MAP_JSON_SCHEMA.json` for structure and `DEV_MAP_RULES.md` for lifecycle/process semantics, then rewrite all dependencies to these owners without backward compatibility.

issues.title: Enforce explicit task breakdown quality in Issue/Task Decomposition Assessment
issues.description: Issue plans currently allow vague assessment prose without an actionable task list. Enforce strict assessment quality rules that require concrete task decomposition with implementation and validation details.

features.title: Decouple DEV_MAP ownership from ID format and support feature moves between milestones.
features.description: This feature introduces explicit ownership links in DEV_MAP and enables moving features between milestones without rewriting child issue/task identity.

issues.title: DEV_MAP schema: decouple ownership from IDs
issues.description: Add explicit ownership fields so milestone/feature relationships are stored as data fields instead of being derived from ID parsing.

issues.title: Data migration/backfill for milestone and feature links
issues.description: Backfill explicit ownership fields for existing DEV_MAP nodes so current hierarchy remains intact after schema evolution.

issues.title: Workflow ID resolution layer without parent-chain regex dependence
issues.description: Refactor workflow resolution logic to use explicit ownership fields and stop deriving hierarchy from ID regex patterns.

issues.title: Command refactor for explicit-parent ownership model
issues.description: Update create/plan/materialize/confirm/sync command paths to validate and resolve parent ownership via explicit fields.

issues.title: Feature move command with child issue/task preservation
issues.description: Implement a dedicated move command to relocate a feature between milestones while preserving child issues, tasks, and mappings.

issues.title: DEV_MAP Viewer drag-and-drop for moving features across milestones
issues.description: Add drag-and-drop interactions in the viewer to move feature nodes between milestones using the canonical move flow.

issues.title: Validation, tests, and docs update for the new ownership model
issues.description: Align tracking validation rules, regression coverage, and protocol docs with explicit ownership fields and move semantics.

issues.title: Optional canonical ID simplification after ownership decoupling
issues.description: Optionally simplify feature/issue canonical IDs after ownership is fully field-driven and no longer encoded in IDs.

features.title: Parse AI-generated markdown templates for issue/feature creation
features.description: This feature introduces a file-based input mechanism (--input) for CLI creation commands, allowing AI agents to safely generate titles and descriptions in Markdown without risking JSON schema corruption.

issues.title: Implement Markdown template parser for CLI inputs
issues.description: CLI commands currently cannot accept multi-line text blocks safely. Implement a parser that extracts # title and # description sections from a provided Markdown draft file.

tasks.title: Add markdown parser module and heading extraction flow
tasks.summary: Create the markdown parser module and implement deterministic title/description extraction from the first two headings in a UTF-8 template file.

tasks.title: Implement parser validation and actionable error handling
tasks.summary: Add missing-file, missing-heading, empty-title, and read-error handling with WorkflowCommandError exit-code-4 guidance for invalid draft inputs.

tasks.title: Cover parser success and failure paths with regression tests
tasks.summary: Add tests for flexible heading levels, empty descriptions, invalid templates, and file-not-found behavior so parser changes stay deterministic.

issues.title: Wire --input argument to create feature and create issue commands
issues.description: The create commands only accept CLI string flags. Extend them to accept an optional --input file path, parse it, and use the extracted values instead of flags.

tasks.title: Add --input argument support to create feature and create issue parsers
tasks.summary: Extend create feature and create issue CLI parsers with optional --input handling and enforce one input mode between draft-file and title/description flags.

tasks.title: Wire parsed draft values into create command handlers
tasks.summary: Update create handlers to call the markdown parser, merge parsed title/description into existing command flow, and preserve backward-compatible flag mode.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for draft-input CLI behavior
tasks.summary: Add command-level tests for successful draft parsing, parser error propagation, conflicting input modes, and unchanged behavior when --input is absent.

issues.title: Update agent workflows to use draft files for CLI commands
issues.description: The current AI workflows generate planning data in memory. Update the agent workflow files (e.g. plan-feature, plan-issue) to explicitly write intellectual output to a temporary draft file and pass it to the CLI commands.

tasks.title: Define canonical markdown draft schema for feature and issue creation
tasks.summary: Create ISSUE_CREATE_INPUT_SCHEMA documentation that defines required headings, optional sections, examples, and recovery guidance for agent-generated draft files.

tasks.title: Update planning protocol for optional draft-file agent output
tasks.summary: Document the markdown draft workflow, tmp/workflow storage convention, and parser-based CLI usage in the feature planning protocol without changing human-only flow requirements.

tasks.title: Update agent workflows to reference draft-file planning flow
tasks.summary: Revise plan-feature and plan-issue workflow docs to reference the schema file and optional draft-file command path while keeping schema rules centralized.

features.title: Refactor issue planning lifecycle with validation gates and command structure
features.description: This feature refines the issue planning workflow by introducing explicit planning states (Pending, Draft, Planned), compact status commands, validation gates for issue and feature scopes, and canonical CLI command structure for planning flows.

issues.title: Introduce Draft planning status and validate issue/feature transitions
issues.description: Add explicit planning lifecycle states in DEV_MAP and implement `validate issue` plus `validate feature` commands that promote Draft plans to Planned after Gate 0 validation passes.

tasks.title: Add Draft planning status lifecycle to tracking helpers
tasks.summary: Introduce explicit Pending, Draft, Planned, and Tasked semantics in DEV_MAP-facing status helpers so planning and validation flows do not infer state from markdown blocks.

tasks.title: Implement validate issue command and Gate 0 checks
tasks.summary: Add issue-scoped validation that reads the issue block from FEATURE_PLANS, enforces Gate 0 structure, and promotes Draft issues to Planned with deterministic errors.

tasks.title: Implement validate feature cascade for child issue plans
tasks.summary: Add feature-scoped validation that checks all child issue plan blocks, promotes validated child issues, and keeps parent feature status aligned with one command.

tasks.title: Cover Draft lifecycle and validation transitions with regression tests
tasks.summary: Lock Pending, Draft, Planned, and feature-level validation behavior with command-level tests so future planning changes do not drift.

issues.title: Wire --input argument to plan issue command for markdown draft parsing
issues.description: Extend `plan issue` CLI to accept optional `--input <draft_file>` argument, parse Markdown template, extract title/description, and insert into FEATURE_PLANS.md issue-plan block.

tasks.title: Add --input draft-file support to plan issue parser
tasks.summary: Extend the canonical plan issue parser to accept a markdown draft file while keeping explicit flag-based planning inputs available.

tasks.title: Write plan issue output as Draft status with deterministic updates
tasks.summary: Route parsed or explicit issue planning values through one write path that creates or updates the issue plan block and sets the target issue to Draft without silent promotion.

tasks.title: Add state guards for Pending, Draft, and Planned issue planning flows
tasks.summary: Prevent mixed input modes, silent Planned downgrades, and ambiguous plan rewrites by adding explicit state and overwrite guardrails to plan issue.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for plan issue input and Draft behavior
tasks.summary: Cover draft-file parsing, explicit-arg planning, lifecycle transitions, and failure cases so plan issue stays deterministic across both input modes.

issues.title: Add canonical status/plan CLI surface and remove legacy feature.plan-issue path
issues.description: Expose canonical top-level `plan issue` plus compact `status issue` and `status feature` commands, and remove the legacy `feature plan-issue` CLI path.

tasks.title: Audit legacy feature plan-issue routing and planning call sites
tasks.summary: Trace every remaining feature.plan-issue registration, help reference, and planning call site so the canonical plan and status surface can replace them cleanly.

tasks.title: Promote plan issue to the canonical top-level planning entrypoint
tasks.summary: Move issue planning to top-level plan issue routing and delete the legacy feature-owned namespace from runtime command registration.

tasks.title: Implement compact status issue and status feature commands
tasks.summary: Expose cheap JSON status commands that report issue and feature lifecycle state without requiring plan-file parsing or verbose tracker dumps.

tasks.title: Add routing tests for canonical status/plan commands and legacy rejection
tasks.summary: Add smoke and regression checks that keep plan issue, status issue, and status feature stable while explicitly rejecting feature plan-issue.

issues.title: Update task-execution-protocol and workflow docs for Pending→Draft→Planned lifecycle
issues.description: Update canonical protocol and workflow documentation to reflect the Pending, Draft, Planned, and Tasked planning lifecycle, compact status commands, cascading feature planning, and explicit validation gates.

tasks.title: Rewrite planning protocol docs around Draft validation lifecycle
tasks.summary: Update the planning and execution protocols so Pending, Draft, Planned, and Tasked are documented consistently with validate and status command gates.

tasks.title: Update plan-feature workflow for cascading draft planning behavior
tasks.summary: Rewrite the plan feature workflow so it can safely draft missing child issue plans without claiming feature-only planning or overwriting validated work.

tasks.title: Update plan-issue workflow to canonical plan and validate flow
tasks.summary: Replace legacy feature plan-issue wording with canonical plan issue guidance and document the Draft-to-Planned transition through validation.

tasks.title: Add consistency checks for lifecycle docs and canonical planning commands
tasks.summary: Verify protocol and workflow docs no longer claim feature-only planning or legacy feature plan-issue syntax after the lifecycle rewrite.

features.title: Refactor workflow CLI into explicit action and entity command grammar
features.description: This feature reorganizes workflow CLI commands around explicit action-first entity scopes such as create feature, create issue, materialize feature, and materialize issue, while clarifying create and sync semantics, preserving deterministic tracker behavior, and aligning help and workflow documentation with the new command model.

issues.title: Add canonical action-first feature commands for create and materialize flows
issues.description: Feature-level workflow operations are currently split across `feature create` and hidden materialize behavior. Add canonical action-first feature commands that expose create and materialize flows directly for the feature entity.

tasks.title: Audit current feature create and materialize behavior
tasks.summary: Trace the existing feature-scoped create and materialize handlers, their local tracker mutations, and their current feature-level GitHub issue side effects.

tasks.title: Define canonical action-first feature command contract
tasks.summary: Specify the target behavior split between create feature and materialize feature, including deterministic success and failure contracts for feature-level issue creation and sync.

tasks.title: Refactor feature routing and handlers to action-first entrypoints
tasks.summary: Move feature registration and feature-issue materialization behind explicit action-first command paths while preserving branch linkage and stable output payloads.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for feature action-first commands
tasks.summary: Cover create feature and materialize feature success and failure paths so the new command surface stays stable during the CLI grammar migration.

issues.title: Add canonical action-first issue commands for create and materialize flows
issues.description: Issue-level workflow operations are currently routed through feature-scoped command shapes such as `feature create-issue` and feature-owned materialize modes. Introduce canonical action-first issue commands with deterministic create and materialize behavior.

tasks.title: Audit current issue create and materialize behavior
tasks.summary: Trace feature-owned issue creation and issue materialize modes, including queue handling, gating rules, and feature-issue side effects that must be preserved or replaced.

tasks.title: Define canonical action-first issue command contract
tasks.summary: Specify the target create issue and materialize issue semantics for single-issue and feature-owned issue-set flows with deterministic failure behavior.

tasks.title: Refactor issue routing and handlers to action-first entrypoints
tasks.summary: Move issue registration, scope resolution, queue validation, and GitHub issue operations behind explicit action-first issue commands without mixing feature-only behavior.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for issue action-first commands
tasks.summary: Cover create issue and materialize issue success and failure paths, including single-issue and feature-owned issue-set behavior.

issues.title: Unify workflow CLI routing, help, and docs around action-first grammar
issues.description: The CLI tree, help text, and workflow docs still describe mixed entity-first and action-first patterns. Align routing, help, and documentation so the new command grammar is discoverable and internally consistent.

tasks.title: Rewrite CLI help and examples for action-first grammar
tasks.summary: Update parser help text and examples so create and materialize commands are discoverable directly through the new action-first command model.

tasks.title: Update workflow and protocol docs to the new command surface
tasks.summary: Align workflow and protocol documentation with the action-first feature and issue command lifecycle, including feature-level issue creation and sync expectations.

tasks.title: Remove legacy command references from runtime and docs
tasks.summary: Replace entity-first and hidden command references with the canonical action-first grammar across runtime messages and repository documentation.

tasks.title: Add consistency checks for help and documentation surfaces
tasks.summary: Add regression checks that keep help output, workflow docs, and runtime guidance aligned on one canonical command model.

features.title: Refine confirm closure semantics and issue execution commit policy
features.description: This feature tightens completion semantics by cleaning FEATURE_PLANS during confirm flows, adding explicit feature-level child-issue cascade rules, and defining an issue-scoped commit policy for execution so closure and commit linkage remain explicit and deterministic.

issues.title: Remove feature plan artifacts during confirm feature only when closure is valid
issues.description: Make confirm feature clean up the entire feature section in FEATURE_PLANS only when all child issues are already Done, and keep deterministic dry-run versus write behavior for feature-level cleanup.

tasks.title: Audit current confirm feature cleanup and closure gates
tasks.summary: Trace existing confirm feature and confirm issue cleanup behavior across FEATURE_PLANS, TASK_LIST, PIPELINE, and GitHub close flows before tightening feature-level closure rules.

tasks.title: Define strict confirm feature closure contract
tasks.summary: Specify the non-cascading confirm feature semantics that require all child issues to already be Done and preview full feature-plan cleanup before write mode.

tasks.title: Implement feature-level FEATURE_PLANS cleanup on valid confirm
tasks.summary: Add feature-section removal to confirm feature when closure preconditions are satisfied while keeping dry-run and write-mode cleanup reporting deterministic.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for strict confirm feature cleanup
tasks.summary: Cover blocked, successful, and idempotent feature confirmation flows so feature-level plan cleanup cannot bypass subtree state requirements.

issues.title: Add explicit child-issue cascade mode for confirm feature
issues.description: Add an explicit feature confirm mode that marks child issues and tasks Done, removes their plan artifacts, and closes mapped GitHub issues in one controlled cascade instead of relying on implicit force semantics.

tasks.title: Define explicit child-issue cascade command surface
tasks.summary: Choose and specify the feature confirm flag that intentionally cascades child issue and task completion instead of overloading force semantics.

tasks.title: Implement subtree cascade executor for confirm feature
tasks.summary: Reuse issue cleanup primitives to confirm child issues and tasks, remove plan artifacts, and close mapped GitHub issues in one explicit feature-level cascade.

tasks.title: Update confirm workflow guidance for strict versus cascade modes
tasks.summary: Document the difference between default strict confirm feature behavior and explicit subtree cascade mode across workflow guidance and runtime help.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for child-issue cascade confirm mode
tasks.summary: Cover dry-run previews, write-mode cascade completion, and mixed subtree states so the new feature-level cascade remains explicit and predictable.

issues.title: Define issue-scoped execution commit policy and workflow guidance
issues.description: Define how execute issue should support explicit commit creation and issue-linked commit messaging, and document the limits of GitHub visibility between child issues and parent feature issues.

tasks.title: Define issue-scoped execution commit policy contract
tasks.summary: Decide whether execute issue commit creation is optional, explicit-flag driven, or documentation-only, and define the canonical issue-linked commit message format.

tasks.title: Evaluate runtime integration points for explicit issue commits
tasks.summary: Inspect execute issue hooks and determine whether explicit commit automation is safe enough for runtime support or should remain workflow guidance only.

tasks.title: Document GitHub issue and feature visibility limits for linked commits
tasks.summary: Clarify what commit references or closing keywords do and do not surface on child issues and parent feature issues so commit expectations stay realistic.

tasks.title: Add coverage or checks for the chosen commit policy behavior
tasks.summary: Lock the selected commit-policy path with runtime tests or documentation consistency checks so execute issue guidance does not drift.

features.title: Replace materialize with explicit publish commands for GitHub issues
features.description: This feature replaces ambiguous materialize naming with explicit publish commands that create feature issues and child issues on GitHub with milestone-linked behavior and clear separation between local registration and remote publication.

issues.title: Add explicit publish command for feature GitHub issue creation
issues.description: Introduce a clear command that publishes a feature as a GitHub issue with milestone assignment and deterministic create-versus-already-published behavior.

tasks.title: Audit current feature issue creation and materialize semantics
tasks.summary: Trace the current feature-level GitHub issue create and sync paths, milestone handling, and local mapping behavior before introducing explicit publish naming.

tasks.title: Define publish feature contract and output semantics
tasks.summary: Specify the create-only feature publication behavior, already-published handling, milestone ownership rules, and deterministic dry-run versus write outputs.

tasks.title: Implement publish feature runtime path
tasks.summary: Expose a publish-oriented feature command that creates the feature GitHub issue and records local mapping state without mixing in unrelated branch materialization behavior.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for publish feature behavior
tasks.summary: Cover dry-run, first publication, and repeat publication flows so feature issue publishing remains deterministic during the command-surface rename.

issues.title: Add explicit publish commands for child issues and feature-owned issue batches
issues.description: Introduce clear commands that publish one issue or all child issues of a feature on GitHub while preserving milestone ownership and parent-feature linkage semantics.

tasks.title: Define publish issue and publish issues batch contracts
tasks.summary: Specify explicit contracts for publishing one child issue and all child issues of a feature, including create, skip, error, and parent-feature linkage behavior.

tasks.title: Implement publish issue runtime path for one child issue
tasks.summary: Expose an explicit single-issue publish command that creates one GitHub issue with milestone ownership and deterministic mapping updates.

tasks.title: Implement publish issues runtime path for feature-owned issue batches
tasks.summary: Add feature-owned issue-batch publication that preserves queue order, milestone lineage, and predictable handling of already-published child issues.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for child issue publish flows
tasks.summary: Cover single-issue publish, feature-owned issue-batch publish, parent-feature linkage edge cases, and deterministic create/skip/error behavior.

issues.title: Rewrite help, workflows, and migration guidance around publish semantics
issues.description: Replace materialize-oriented help and workflow guidance with publish-focused commands so users can clearly distinguish local registration from GitHub issue publication.

tasks.title: Rewrite CLI help and examples around publish commands
tasks.summary: Replace materialize-oriented help text and examples with publish feature, publish issue, and publish issues commands that make side effects obvious.

tasks.title: Update workflow docs for local registration versus GitHub publication
tasks.summary: Rewrite workflow guidance so local create flows and remote publish flows are clearly separated, including milestone behavior and parent/child publication paths.

tasks.title: Clean up legacy materialize wording and migration guidance
tasks.summary: Remove materialize as the canonical issue-creation wording from runtime guidance and repository docs while keeping any explicit migration notes accurate.

tasks.title: Add consistency checks for publish help and docs surfaces
tasks.summary: Lock help output and workflow documentation to one publish-oriented command model so materialize wording does not drift back into canonical guidance.

features.title: Add milestone-level feature execution order planning block
features.description: This feature adds a milestone-scoped recommended feature execution order block to FEATURE_PLANS, updates planning and sync flows to maintain it consistently, and removes completed feature entries from that order during confirm cleanup.

issues.title: Define and persist milestone-level feature execution order structure
issues.description: Define the canonical FEATURE_PLANS structure for milestone-scoped feature execution order and update schemas or delta contracts so planning data can carry recommended feature ordering explicitly.

tasks.title: Define canonical milestone execution-order block format
tasks.summary: Specify the top-level FEATURE_PLANS structure for milestone-scoped feature execution order, including milestone sections, row format, and empty-section behavior.

tasks.title: Add parser and lint support for milestone execution-order structure
tasks.summary: Extend plan parsing and lint logic so the new global execution-order block is accepted, validated, and rejected deterministically when malformed.

tasks.title: Update planning schema and delta contracts for execution-order metadata
tasks.summary: Adjust any planning schema or delta payload surfaces that need to carry milestone execution-order metadata explicitly.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for execution-order block structure handling
tasks.summary: Cover valid and malformed milestone execution-order structures so the new top-level block remains stable under parsing and linting.

issues.title: Integrate feature execution order maintenance into planning and sync flows
issues.description: Update plan feature and related sync or CLI flows so planned features are inserted into the milestone execution order deterministically and reordered safely when planning data changes.

tasks.title: Define planning ownership and insertion rules for feature execution order
tasks.summary: Decide how plan feature owns entry creation, append or reorder behavior, and how unplanned features stay out of milestone execution order.

tasks.title: Integrate execution-order maintenance into plan feature flows
tasks.summary: Update plan initialization and plan write flows so planned features are inserted or updated in the milestone execution-order block deterministically.

tasks.title: Integrate execution-order maintenance into planning sync or delta flows
tasks.summary: Ensure any sync, reconciliation, or delta-driven planning paths can maintain the milestone execution-order block without drifting from authored plans.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for append, replan, and title-update cases
tasks.summary: Cover first-entry, later-entry, repeat planning, and title-change behavior so execution-order maintenance stays predictable.

issues.title: Clean feature execution order on confirm and document milestone planning semantics
issues.description: Remove completed features from the milestone execution order during confirm feature cleanup and document when execution-order entries are created, updated, and removed across workflows.

tasks.title: Define confirm cleanup contract for milestone execution order
tasks.summary: Specify when confirm feature removes a feature from the milestone execution-order block and how dry-run versus write cleanup should be reported.

tasks.title: Implement milestone execution-order cleanup during confirm feature
tasks.summary: Extend confirm feature cleanup so completed features are removed from the milestone execution-order block in the same write run as other planning artifacts.

tasks.title: Update workflows and docs for milestone execution-order lifecycle
tasks.summary: Document when planning adds execution-order entries, when confirm removes them, and how milestone-level ordering fits into the planning lifecycle.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for confirm cleanup and empty-section handling
tasks.summary: Cover dry-run previews, successful cleanup, and empty milestone-section behavior so execution-order removal stays deterministic.

features.title: Add GitHub issue metadata sync for labels and project status
features.description: This feature syncs workflow issue metadata to GitHub by assigning structural labels such as feature, engine, client, and workflow, and by mapping local workflow states to GitHub Project status values during publish, planning, validation, task decomposition, execution, and confirmation flows.

issues.title: Define GitHub label and project-status sync contract
issues.description: Define the canonical mapping between local workflow entities and GitHub labels, and map local workflow states to GitHub Project status values (`Pending -> Open`, `Draft/Planned/Tasked -> In progress`, `Done -> Done`) with explicit create/update semantics.

issues.title: Integrate metadata sync into publish, planning, validation, and confirmation flows
issues.description: Wire GitHub label assignment and Project status updates into publish-oriented issue creation and later workflow transitions such as plan issue, validate issue or feature, plan tasks, execute, and confirm.

issues.title: Add docs, project-setup guidance, and regression coverage for GitHub metadata sync
issues.description: Document label semantics, GitHub Project field requirements, fallback behavior when project metadata is unavailable, and add regression coverage that keeps metadata sync deterministic.

features.title: Execute-feature context collector command
features.description: Add a canonical command that returns feature plan block, mapped task-list tasks, and pipeline overlap intersections for execute-feature workflow.

issues.title: Add canonical workflow get context feature|issue commands
issues.description: Introduce canonical commands `workflow get context feature <feature_id>` and `workflow get context issue <issue_id>` that aggregate plan, task list, and overlap context.

tasks.title: Add canonical CLI surface for get context feature|issue
tasks.summary: Introduce command routing for `workflow get context feature <id>` and `workflow get context issue <id>` with deterministic help and argument validation.

tasks.title: Implement feature-scoped context collector payload
tasks.summary: Collect feature plan section, mapped task objects, and pipeline overlap intersections for one feature ID.

tasks.title: Implement issue-scoped context collector payload
tasks.summary: Resolve owner feature+issue, extract exact issue-plan block, join issue tasks, and compute issue overlap intersections.

issues.title: Wire execute-feature workflow to workflow get context feature
issues.description: Update execute-feature workflow to use `workflow get context feature <feature_id>` as the mandatory context source before task execution steps.

tasks.title: Update execute-feature and execute-issue workflows to require context commands
tasks.summary: Replace manual multi-file read steps with mandatory `workflow get context ...` command usage in execution workflows.

tasks.title: Align execution protocol wording with context-command read contract
tasks.summary: Add explicit read-contract wording so execution docs require non-empty plan block, mapped tasks, and overlap payload fields from context commands.

issues.title: Add post-reorg compatibility checks and regression coverage
issues.description: Add regression checks for collector payload integrity and canonical post-reorg command naming surfaces.

tasks.title: Add CLI regression coverage for get context command surface
tasks.summary: Extend workflow CLI tests to assert help/usage for the new get context command grammar and selectors.

tasks.title: Add payload and negative-path tests for feature and issue context commands
tasks.summary: Add tests for successful payload shape and deterministic errors on unknown IDs or unresolved references.

tasks.title: Add naming-regression checks for execute workflow command strings
tasks.summary: Protect execution docs/tests against legacy context-command wording drift after command-surface reorganization.

features.title: Issue-level overlap indexing and planning workflow
features.description: Introduce dependency indexing, related-issue discovery, issue-level overlap build/apply commands, and sequence model refactor for planning and execution flows.

issues.title: Add dependency index and plan-block extraction CLI
issues.description: Add workflow commands to index dependencies from issue plans, show related issues, and return plan blocks by feature/issue ID.

tasks.title: Register dependency-index CLI command surface
tasks.summary: Add canonical plan commands for indexing, related lookup, and plan-block retrieval.

tasks.title: Implement Dependencies block parser and scoped index writer
tasks.summary: Parse issue Dependencies blocks and persist deterministic ISSUE_DEP_INDEX payloads.

tasks.title: Implement show-related and get-plan-block handlers
tasks.summary: Return scoped candidate issue sets and exact Dependencies block payloads.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for dependency index commands
tasks.summary: Lock command parsing, scoped refresh, cleanup, and extraction contracts.

issues.title: Introduce issue-level overlap schema and validators
issues.description: Replace task-level overlaps with issue-level overlap records and enforce strict validation rules for dependency/conflict/shared_logic contracts.

tasks.title: Add ISSUE_OVERLAPS file path and schema contract
tasks.summary: Introduce dedicated overlaps artifact wiring in workflow context and schema assets.

tasks.title: Implement issue-overlap validators and store helpers
tasks.summary: Validate and persist issue-level overlap payloads through runtime helpers.

tasks.title: Reject legacy pipeline overlap shape during overlaps validation
tasks.summary: Fail with migration guidance when old task-level overlap contracts are still used.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for issue-overlap schema rules
tasks.summary: Cover valid and invalid dependency, conflict, and shared_logic overlap records.

issues.title: Add build/show/apply overlap commands
issues.description: Implement CLI commands to read current overlaps, build scoped overlap deltas from candidate issues, and apply updates through parser-controlled writes.

tasks.title: Add show-overlaps command for ISSUE_OVERLAPS reads
tasks.summary: Expose scoped overlap reads from the dedicated overlaps artifact.

tasks.title: Implement build-overlaps draft generator
tasks.summary: Build deterministic overlap draft payloads from dependency index candidates.

tasks.title: Implement apply-overlaps write path
tasks.summary: Validate and persist overlap delta payloads into ISSUE_OVERLAPS.

tasks.title: Add build-overlaps workflow contract and end-to-end coverage
tasks.summary: Document CLI plus analysis sequence and cover the command chain with tests.

issues.title: Integrate plan-tasks with issue-level overlaps
issues.description: Make plan tasks consume prebuilt issue overlaps as planning constraints and stop append-only overlap updates from the old path.

tasks.title: Load ISSUE_OVERLAPS planning context inside plan-tasks handlers
tasks.summary: Make decomposition handlers read issue-overlap constraints from the new artifact.

tasks.title: Remove direct overlap append behavior from plan-tasks flow
tasks.summary: Stop treating plan-tasks delta writes as the source of truth for overlaps.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for overlaps-aware plan-tasks behavior
tasks.summary: Verify plan-tasks reads overlap context and no longer mutates overlaps directly.

issues.title: Add confirm cleanup for issue-level overlaps and sequences
issues.description: Ensure confirm issue/feature done cleans related overlap entries and issue/task sequence artifacts deterministically.

tasks.title: Remove issue overlap entries during confirm cleanup
tasks.summary: Clean issue and feature overlap records when confirmation removes completed scope.

tasks.title: Reuse dependency-index removal in confirm flows
tasks.summary: Trigger scoped dependency-index cleanup for confirmed issues and features.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for confirm overlap and index cleanup
tasks.summary: Cover dry-run and write-mode cleanup for issue and feature confirmation.

issues.title: Refactor execution sequence model and migrate pipeline data
issues.description: Replace global task execution sequence usage with issue execution sequence plus per-issue task sequence and migrate existing pipeline records.

tasks.title: Implement migration from pipeline overlaps to ISSUE_OVERLAPS
tasks.summary: Extract legacy overlap rows into the dedicated overlaps artifact in deterministic order.

tasks.title: Cut runtime overlap reads and writes over to ISSUE_OVERLAPS
tasks.summary: Switch command handlers and helpers to the new overlaps file as the only runtime source.

tasks.title: Remove pipeline overlap ownership from schemas and workflow contracts
tasks.summary: Strip overlap storage responsibilities from pipeline schemas, protocols, and workflows.

tasks.title: Add migration and overlaps-only cutover regression coverage
tasks.summary: Prove migration, no-op rerun, and post-cutover contract enforcement.

issues.title: Enforce strict Dependencies format for planning parser compatibility
issues.description: Define and enforce strict dependency line format in issue plans so dependency index parser can parse surfaces deterministically.

tasks.title: Define strict Dependencies token format across planning docs
tasks.summary: Lock one canonical dependency-line format for issue plans and parser consumers.

tasks.title: Enforce dependency-line validation in feature plan linting
tasks.summary: Reject free-form Dependencies rows and surface deterministic lint errors.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for strict Dependencies validation
tasks.summary: Cover valid and invalid dependency-line formats in workflow tests.

issues.title: Remove TASK_EXECUTION_PIPELINE from workflow runtime entirely
issues.description: Eliminate remaining runtime reads, cleanup paths, schema contracts, and workflow references tied to TASK_EXECUTION_PIPELINE so overlaps/index artifacts and existing tracker state fully replace it.

tasks.title: Remove execution-plan and task execution runtime reads of TASK_EXECUTION_PIPELINE
tasks.summary: Switch feature execution planning and execution-prep flows to canonical sources that do not require pipeline artifacts.

tasks.title: Remove pipeline cleanup and tracker runtime dependencies
tasks.summary: Cut confirm cleanup, tracker store, and validator/runtime code paths that still require pipeline payloads.

tasks.title: Remove TASK_EXECUTION_PIPELINE contracts from schemas, docs, and workflows
tasks.summary: Delete obsolete schema/rule/workflow references so runtime contracts no longer describe pipeline ownership.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for pipeline-free workflow runtime
tasks.summary: Prove planning, execution-plan, confirm, and validation flows work when TASK_EXECUTION_PIPELINE is absent.

issues.title: Remove feature plan section on confirm feature done
issues.description: Ensure confirm feature done removes the full feature section from FEATURE_PLANS so confirmed features do not leave obsolete plan blocks behind.
